exemplar.title: To what extent is the O2 arena spatially efficient in comparison to similar arenas?

detailedExemplarData.title: To what extent is the O2 arena spatially efficient in comparison to similar arenas?

subject.title: Mathematics Analysis and Approaches (AA)
subject.description:
**IB Mathematics Analysis and Approaches** is a **Group 5** subject in the **International Baccalaureate Diploma Programme (IBDP)**. It explores **number and algebra, functions, geometry and trigonometry, statistics and probability, and calculus**, with a strong focus on **theoretical understanding, formal mathematical reasoning, and analytical problem-solving**.

The course is available at **Standard Level (SL, 150 teaching hours)** and **Higher Level (HL, 240 teaching hours)**, with **first assessment in 2021**.

### Assessment at a Glance

| Assessment | Format | SL | HL | Weighting |
|------------|--------|----|----|-----------|
| **Paper 1** | Non-calculator written exam | 90 minutes | 120 minutes | 40% |
| **Paper 2** | Calculator allowed written exam | 90 minutes | 120 minutes | 40% |
| **Paper 3** | Calculator allowed problem-solving | N/A | 60 minutes | 20% (HL only) |
| **Mathematical Exploration** | Internal Assessment | 20 hours | 20 hours | 20% |

strengths: Clear logical development with a coherent sequence (introduction, methodology, comparison, evaluation, conclusion)
Well-structured report with a table of contents, consistent heading hierarchy and numbered pages
Diagrams, figures and sub-headings appear in appropriate places to guide the reader
weaknesses: Explanations can be overly long-winded, interrupting conciseness
Some pagination inconsistencies and very tight table spacing reduce readability
Occasional digressions on elementary concepts detract from overall focus
feedback.calculationMethod: Holistic AI evaluation: The work clearly meets the âcoherent and logically developedâ and âwell organised with clear structureâ descriptors, but the presence of unnecessary material and minor structural issues prevents it reaching the top band. A score of 3/4 accurately reflects strong overall presentation with room for tighter conciseness and full consistency.

strengths: Mostly consistent and accurate use of mathematical notation and symbols
Effective use of multiple representations (graphs overlaid on photos, tables, algebraic expressions) linked to the narrative
Good logical progression of calculations with step-by-step explanations
weaknesses: Minor notation inconsistencies (e.g., missing brackets, intermittent parentheses)
Some axes on figures are unlabeled and a few images appear blurred
Could improve clarity by explicitly labelling intermediate terms in summations
feedback.calculationMethod: Holistic AI evaluation: Mathematical communication is generally clear, with effective representations and a sound logical structure, but sporadic formatting lapses and minor omissions keep it in band 3. A score of 3/4 reflects solid performance without the flawless consistency required for the top level.

strengths: Clear personal motivation demonstrated by connection to the studentâs residence near the Oâ Arena
Significant independent thinking in choosing sine and ellipse models for two different arenas
Good creativity and initiative in using GeoGebra overlays and piece-wise function construction
weaknesses: Modelling decisions, while effective, follow conventional IA approaches rather than highly innovative methods
Personal approach is evident but not pushed to an exceptional or novel level
feedback.calculationMethod: Holistic AI evaluation: The investigation shows clear personal engagement through real-world context and self-devised modelling strategies, aligning with the band 2 descriptors. It does not, however, reach the originality or innovation required for band 3, so a score of 2/3 is appropriate.

strengths: Identifies key sources of error (photo angle, curve approximation) in a dedicated evaluation section
Acknowledges estimation issues and their potential impact on outcomes
weaknesses: Reflection is confined to a single concluding section rather than interwoven
Lacks depth and critical insightâno quantitative error analysis or sensitivity testing
Limited discussion of future refinements or broader implications
feedback.calculationMethod: Holistic AI evaluation: Reflection is present but very basic, matching the âlimited reflectionâ, âbasic analysisâ, and âlimited evaluation of outcomesâ descriptors. The work stays in band 1, meriting 1/3.

strengths: Comprehensive application of relevant mathematics: integration of piece-wise trigonometric functions, domain restrictions, scaling and unit conversion
Use of u-substitution, double-angle identities and volume of revolution demonstrates well-applied course-level techniques
Demonstrates thorough conceptual understanding by linking each mathematical step to the real-world modelling context
weaknesses: Occasional algebraic slips (e.g., omitted continuity justification at boundaries)
Numeric verifications and sanity checks are sometimes absent
A few steps would benefit from explicit statement of intermediate limits and factors
feedback.calculationMethod: Holistic AI evaluation: The mathematics is used comprehensively and effectively, with techniques fully commensurate with the SL course level. Although there are minor errors and omissions, the breadth and depth of the methods, together with correct application of advanced calculus, align with the band 5 descriptors. A score of 5/6 accurately captures this strong performance just below the expert level.

strandSelections.reasoning: Calculations are explained step-by-step, with intermediate algebra shown and diagrams referenced in the text.  While the exposition can be wordy, the logical progression of mathematical reasoning is clear, justifying the âgood logical structure and clear communicationâ band.

Derivations indicate understanding of substitutions and linearity, but algebraic slips (e.g., dimensional scaling, unexplained factor cancellations) appear and numerical answers are not systematically verified.  Overall accuracy is good with minor errors, matching the 3-mark descriptor.

The student incorporates graphs overlaid on photographs, algebraic expressions, tabulated contents and final ratio calculations.  These multiple representations are well linked to the discussion and aid comprehension, though some images are blurred and axes occasionally unlabeled, placing the work in the âeffectiveâ rather than âhighly effectiveâ category.

The exploration follows a clear sequence â introduction, methodology, modelling of the two arenas, comparison, evaluation and conclusion.  Each section logically prepares the reader for the next, and calculations appear where they are expected.  Although some explanations are long-winded, the overall argument never loses the reader and there are no major gaps in reasoning.  This aligns with the descriptor âcoherent and logically developedâ rather than the exemplary level, which would require tighter linking and smoother transitions throughout.

Using GeoGebra to overlay images, crafting a four-part sine approximation, and attempting an alternative ellipse model for the Sphere demonstrate creativity and initiative beyond minimal requirements.  The strategies are useful but not exceptionally novel, matching the descriptor for a âgood level of creativity and initiative.â

The student identifies over- and under-estimation, acknowledges shortcomings of the image-based model, and notes the mismatch between full-dome volume and seating capacity.  These remarks show basic, not in-depth, analysis of results and method, thus fitting the âbasic analysisâ band.

Outcome evaluation is limited to qualitative statements that O2 is âmore efficientâ and that measurement issues may skew results.  There is no quantitative sensitivity test or discussion of future refinements, corresponding to âlimited evaluation of outcomes.â

Reflection is brief and largely confined to a concluding âEvaluationâ section that lists potential sources of error (photo angle, inclusion of retail space).  The comments are surface-level and not interwoven throughout the report, fulfilling only the âlimited reflection presentâ criterion.

Mathematical symbols (â«, Ï, domains, piece-wise notation) and function notation are used throughout and usually formatted correctly.  Minor inconsistencies occur (e.g. intermittent use of parentheses, missing powers) but do not hinder understanding, satisfying the âmostly consistentâ descriptor.

The investigation is clearly motivated by the studentâs residence near the O2 and includes self-devised aims and methodology.  This constitutes a âclear personal approach,â though the execution mirrors standard IA modelling tasks, so it does not reach the highest band.

Most material is relevant to determining volumes and comparing spaceâper-person ratios, yet passages explaining elementary trigonometric identities, transformation terminology and repeated references to scaling stretch the report and reduce conciseness.  These digressions fit the descriptor âmostly relevant with some unnecessary elements.â

Integration, trigonometric modelling and volume of revolution are all relevant to finding spatial efficiency and are applied correctly in most instances.  The mathematics is purposeful but not extended to more advanced techniques such as regression, optimisation or 3-D software verification, so ârelevant mathematics used appropriatelyâ (3) is the most fitting band.

Selecting two real-world arenas, sourcing images, and deciding to model one with a piece-wise sine curve and the other with an ellipse shows noticeable personal decision-making beyond textbook procedures.  However, modelling choices remain conventional and not deeply original, aligning with âsignificantâ rather than âoutstandingâ evidence of independent thinking.

A table of contents, numbered pages and consistent heading hierarchy give the report an identifiable structure.  Diagrams, figures and sub-headings generally appear in suitable places.  However, pagination is sometimes inconsistent and some digressions (e.g. extended explanations of basic function transformations) interrupt the flow.  Hence the work is âwell organised with clear structureâ rather than âexceptionally well organised.â

Calculus with trig functions, domain restrictions, scaling and unit conversion are all at HL level and handled competently.  The breadth and depth are solidly âfully commensurate with course level,â though not sufficiently sophisticated for the top two bands.

annotations.comment: Good explanation of volume formula. Always reintroduce Ï after simplification to avoid confusion later.
The bold title effectively announces the research focus and engages the reader. Consider adding the date or context to situate the investigation further.
Student name is clear but consider including candidate number and date to meet administrative conventions.
The table of contents provides clear navigation but the very tight cell spacing makes page numbers hard to read. Increase row height or font contrast.
Page numbering appears in the footer but is inconsistent; ensure all pages display the number for easier reference.
Introduction clearly states the aim to compare spatial efficiency, but the paragraph is overly wordy and could be split into shorter, focused sentences.
Aims are enumerated clearly in list form, providing a logical structure to the investigation plan.
The methodology description lacks detail on criteria for selecting photos; justify why these images accurately represent the profiles.
The decision to use volume of revolution is appropriate, but the rationale for choosing sine for one arena and a circle for the other should be more thoroughly explained.
Figure 1 clearly shows the profile photo. Consider adding gridlines or axis labels for scale reference on the image.
Explanation of function transformations demonstrates understanding of parameters a, b, c, d. Nice use of notation.
Presentation of multiple sine functions is effective, but provide a small table summarizing each functionâs domain and parameter values for quick reference.
When defining h(x), q(x), p(x), s(x), the text repeats parameter justifications. Consider consolidating this into one concise paragraph.
Figure 3 effectively illustrates restricted domains, aiding comprehension of piecewise construction.
Piecewise function v(x) is clearly defined, but explicitly state continuity at domain boundaries to ensure mathematical rigor.
When removing Ï as a constant, note explicitly that it will be reintroduced to ensure no step is overlooked.
In the expansion of (310 sin(u) â 23)Â², ensure parentheses enclose the full expression; the current typesetting omits one bracket.
Clear step-by-step integration using substitution demonstrates solid understanding of u-substitution.
In the double-angle step, explicitly show substitution of sinÂ²(u)=Â½(1âcos(2u)) to reinforce clarity and avoid leaps.
Arithmetic in combining constants results in large numbers; recommend verifying the coefficients using a CAS for accuracy.
When converting back from u to x, include the updated limits to maintain transparency in the definite integral evaluation.
Definite integral result (â7.040) seems small relative to others; include a quick sanity check or approximation to confirm scale.
Summation of the four integrals is correct, but label each term explicitly as h(x), q(x), p(x), s(x) for full mathematical communication.
Scaling back to real-world dimensions is handled well; explicitly state multiplication by 10Â³ to reinforce unit conversion.
Reflection on methodological limitations is only presented in evaluation; integrate critical insights after each major section to deepen reflection.
The evaluation identifies photo angle and curve approximation issues, but lacks quantitative impact analysis or error bounds.
Personal connection to the O2 Arena shows strong engagement; referencing residence adds authenticity to the investigation.
The conclusion restates the hypothesis and findings clearly but could benefit from a forward-looking suggestion for further research.
Bibliography is comprehensive with varied sources. Ensure consistent formatting (e.g., italics) and verify access dates.
Linking graphs overlaid on photographs demonstrates effective use of multiple representations; ensure all axes are labeled for clarity.
The use of u-substitution and double-angle identities shows appropriate HLâlevel mathematics, but avoid minor algebraic slips by proofreading each step.
